name: Ancient Fantasy City RPG
description: You live in an ancient civilization far more advanced than any other civilization in the universe. Buildings stand tall and architecture is baffling as it somehow overrides the laws of physics. Many creatures and some humans call the city home while others live rurally, usually in forests or in the ocean. In this RPG you will go through endless encounters and whatever you choose will affect the outcome of your story. Have fun!
creator: XZiag_80
